nasb.text: This was the dedication offering for the altar from the leaders of Israel when it was anointed: twelve silver dishes, twelve silver bowls, twelve gold pans,

esv.text: This was the dedication offering for the altar on the day when it was anointed, from the chiefs of Israel: twelve silver plates, twelve silver basins, twelve golden dishes,

cnv.text: 用膏抹祭壇的日子，以色列的眾領袖獻上奉獻祭壇的供物，共有銀盤十二個、銀碗十二個、金盂十二個，

ccb.text: 以上是膏抹祭坛时以色列各首领为献坛之礼所献的供物，共计有银盘、银碗和金碟子各十二个，
